attribution.changes: Statements formalized (translated) into Lean 4 by parZer; proofs are conditional on the disclosed sorry-stubs.
attribution.title: Sharp bounds for covering with large cliques and independent sets

nodes.label: IsEnabling
nodes.lean:
def IsEnabling (k₁ k₂ : ℕ) {n : ℕ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) : Prop :=
  ∀ v : Fin n, (∃ s : Finset (Fin n), G.IsNClique k₁ s ∧ v ∈ s) ∧ (∃ t : Finset (Fin n), G.IsNIndepSet k₂ t ∧ v ∈ t)

nodes.label: enablingNum
nodes.lean:
noncomputable def enablingNum (k₁ k₂ : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  sInf {n : ℕ | ∃ G : SimpleGraph (Fin n), IsEnabling k₁ k₂ G}

nodes.label: IsColEnabling
nodes.lean:
def IsColEnabling (r k : ℕ) {n : ℕ} (c : Fin n → Fin n → Fin r) : Prop :=
  (∀ x y : Fin n, c x y = c y x) ∧ ∀ (v : Fin n) (i : Fin r), ∃ s : Finset (Fin n), v ∈ s ∧ s.card = k ∧ ∀ x ∈ s, ∀ y ∈ s, x ≠ y → c x y = i

nodes.label: colEnablingNum
nodes.lean:
noncomputable def colEnablingNum (r k : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  sInf {n : ℕ | ∃ c : Fin n → Fin n → Fin r, IsColEnabling r k c}

nodes.label: thm_lem_lowerbound
nodes.lean: theorem thm_lem_lowerbound : ∀ (k₁ k₂ : ℕ), 2 ≤ k₁ → 2 ≤ k₂ → (Real.sqrt ((k₁ : ℝ) - 1) + Real.sqrt ((k₂ : ℝ) - 1)) ^ 2 ≤ (enablingNum k₁ k₂ : ℝ) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_lem_eq_if_int
nodes.lean: theorem thm_lem_eq_if_int : ∀ (k₁ k₂ : ℕ), 2 ≤ k₁ → 2 ≤ k₂ → ∀ m : ℕ, (m : ℝ) = (Real.sqrt ((k₁ : ℝ) - 1) + Real.sqrt ((k₂ : ℝ) - 1)) ^ 2 → ∃ G : SimpleGraph (Fin m), IsEnabling k₁ k₂ G := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_main
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_thm_main : ∀ (k₁ k₂ : ℕ), 2 ≤ k₁ → 2 ≤ k₂ → ((Real.sqrt ((k₁ : ℝ) - 1) + Real.sqrt ((k₂ : ℝ) - 1)) ^ 2 ≤ (enablingNum k₁ k₂ : ℝ)) ∧ (∀ m : ℕ, (m : ℝ) = (Real.sqrt ((k₁ : ℝ) - 1) + Real.sqrt ((k₂ : ℝ) - 1)) ^ 2 → (enablingNum k₁ k₂ : ℝ) = (Real.sqrt ((k₁ : ℝ) - 1) + Real.sqrt ((k₂ : ℝ) - 1)) ^ 2) := by
  intro k₁ k₂ hk₁ hk₂; refine ⟨thm_lem_lowerbound k₁ k₂ hk₁ hk₂, ?_⟩; intro m hm; have hle : enablingNum k₁ k₂ ≤ m := Nat.sInf_le (thm_lem_eq_if_int k₁ k₂ hk₁ hk₂ m hm); have h1 : ((enablingNum k₁ k₂ : ℕ) : ℝ) ≤ (m : ℝ) := Nat.cast_le.mpr hle; rw [hm] at h1; exact le_antisymm h1 (thm_lem_lowerbound k₁ k₂ hk₁ hk₂)

nodes.label: thm_lem_multicol_lb
nodes.lean: theorem thm_lem_multicol_lb : ∀ (r k : ℕ), 2 ≤ r → 2 ≤ k → 2 * (r : ℤ) * (k : ℤ) - 2 * (r : ℤ) * ((r : ℤ) - 1) ≤ (colEnablingNum r k : ℤ) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_lem_conj_extrem
nodes.lean: theorem thm_lem_conj_extrem : ∀ (r k : ℕ), 2 ≤ r → 2 ≤ k → (colEnablingNum r k : ℤ) ≤ 2 * (r : ℤ) * ((k : ℤ) - 1) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_multicol
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_thm_multicol : ∀ (r k : ℕ), 2 ≤ r → 2 ≤ k → (2 * (r : ℤ) * (k : ℤ) - 2 * (r : ℤ) * ((r : ℤ) - 1) ≤ (colEnablingNum r k : ℤ)) ∧ ((colEnablingNum r k : ℤ) ≤ 2 * (r : ℤ) * ((k : ℤ) - 1)) := by
  intro r k hr hk; exact ⟨thm_lem_multicol_lb r k hr hk, thm_lem_conj_extrem r k hr hk⟩

nodes.label: thm_lem_improved
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_lem_improved : ∀ (m : ℕ) (x : Fin m → ℝ), (∀ i, 0 ≤ x i) → (∀ i, x i ≤ 1) → 0 ≤ (∑ i, ∑ j, if i < j then x i * x j else 0) - (∑ i, x i) + 1 := by
  intro m; induction m with | zero => (intro x h0 h1; norm_num) | succ n ih => (intro x h0 h1; have hlast : (∑ j, if Fin.last n < j then x (Fin.last n) * x j else 0) = 0 := Finset.sum_eq_zero fun j _ => if_neg (not_lt.mpr (Fin.le_last j)); have key : (∑ i, ∑ j, if i < j then x i * x j else 0) = (∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, if i < j then x (Fin.castSucc i) * x (Fin.castSucc j) else 0) + (∑ i : Fin n, x (Fin.castSucc i)) * x (Fin.last n) := (by rw [Fin.sum_univ_castSucc (f := fun i => ∑ j, if i < j then x i * x j else 0)]; rw [hlast, add_zero, Finset.sum_mul, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]; refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i _ => ?_; rw [Fin.sum_univ_castSucc (f := fun j => if Fin.castSucc i < j then x (Fin.castSucc i) * x j else 0)]; rw [if_pos (Fin.castSucc_lt_last i)]; all_goals congr 1); have hSsplit : (∑ i, x i) = (∑ i : Fin n, x (Fin.castSucc i)) + x (Fin.last n) := Fin.sum_univ_castSucc x; have hD0 : 0 ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, if i < j then x (Fin.castSucc i) * x (Fin.castSucc j) else 0 := Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ => Finset.sum_nonneg fun j _ => (by split <;> first | exact mul_nonneg (h0 _) (h0 _) | exact le_rfl); have hIH := ih (fun i => x (Fin.castSucc i)) (fun i => h0 _) (fun i => h1 _); simp only [] at hIH; rw [key, hSsplit]; rcases le_total (∑ i : Fin n, x (Fin.castSucc i)) 1 with hS | hS; all_goals nlinarith [hIH, hD0, h0 (Fin.last n), h1 (Fin.last n), hS])

title: Sharp bounds for covering with large cliques and independent sets
